title: SBO3L ENS Fleet Manifest v1
description: Manifest of an SBO3L agent fleet issued under sbo3lagent.eth via Durin (T-3-3 fleet-of-5 / T-3-4 60-agent ENS-AGENT-A1 amplifier). Records the canonical inputs (seed_doc, parent, network), per-agent identity (FQDN, pubkey, capabilities), and the broadcast outputs (tx hashes, Etherscan links). Reviewers re-derive every pubkey byte-for-byte from `seed_doc` + `agents[].label`; broadcast outputs are auditable on-chain.

generated_at_utc.description: RFC 3339 timestamp the manifest skeleton was created (before the broadcast loop).

parent.description: ENS parent name (e.g. `sbo3lagent.eth`). Subnames are issued at <agent.label>.<parent>.

seed_doc.description: Public seed string used to derive each agent's Ed25519 keypair. Anyone holding this manifest re-derives every pubkey via SHA-256(seed_doc + ':' + label).

label.description: Single DNS label (no `.`). Forms the leftmost element of the FQDN.

agent_id.description: Stable identifier for the agent. Written into the `sbo3l:agent_id` text record.

pubkey_ed25519.description: 32-byte Ed25519 public key, hex-encoded (no `0x`). Deterministic from seed_doc + label.

register_tx_hash.description: Tx hash of the Durin `register(...)` call. Null until the broadcast loop runs.

multicall_tx_hash.description: Tx hash of the PublicResolver `multicall(setText × N)` call. Null until the broadcast loop runs.

gas_used_total.description: Sum of gas used across all successful broadcasts. Null until the broadcast loop runs (cast send doesn't surface gas without an extra `cast receipt` round-trip).
